steps.title: Use the historical timeframe
steps.content: The Dust Bowl happened during the 1930s, and the next sentence says the storms "reached" Washington, DC. The blank should use a simple past-tense verb for a completed historical event.

steps.title: Reject future and present forms
steps.content: A describes action happening now. B describes something completed before a future point. C projects the action into the future. None fits dust storms from the 1930s. The answer is D.
